title: BuyAlaska: Move Your Money Month – Bank Local, Invest Local
summary: This April, BuyAlaska is spotlighting how to move your money to make a difference! Investing locally in Alaska gives entrepreneurs and businesses the capital they need to grow while also recirculating money within the community to foster growth.
